creator: dutchbsd@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to O. Hartmann from comment #0)

I think this is not the only problem.
we need samba ports upgraded!

samba413 is discontinued (EOL) since 2022-03-21

see https://wiki.samba.org/index.php/Samba_Release_Planning

i think we need samba415 and samba416 ports
